lrMoveDistanceMax.AltName: Maximum distance for viewpoint distance rate due to left/right movement [m]

lrMoveRateMin.AltName: Minimum viewpoint distance rate due to left/right movement

lrMoveRateMax.AltName: Maximum viewpoint distance rate due to left/right movement

fulcrumDistRate.AltName: Fulcrum distance ratio (1.0: Distance to camera

transChaseRateEscapeWall.AltName: Character translation tracking rate for wall avoidance (0.0 to 1.0)

targetRotXChaseRate.AltName: Target X-axis rotation tracking rate (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseRateXZForNormal.AltName: Normal target XZ tracking rate (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseRateXZForEscapeWall.AltName: Target XZ tracking rate for wall avoidance (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseRateAtLockXZ.AltName: Target XZ tracking rate while locked (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseRateAtLockY.AltName: Target Y tracking rate while locked (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseRateMinAngAtLock.AltName: Target tracking rate minimum angle while locked [deg]

targetChaseRateMaxAngAtLock.AltName: Maximum angle of target tracking rate while locked [deg]

transChaseByCtrlEndWaitTime.AltName: Translational tracking wait time after operation ends [sec]

transChaseByCtrlEndReleaseTime.AltName: Translational tracking release time upon completion of operation [sec]

rotHiSpeedRateIncTime.AltName: High speed rotation rate increase time [sec]

rotRangeMinXAtLock.AltName: Minimum value of X-axis rotation while locked [deg]

rotRangeMaxXAtLock.AltName: Maximum value of X-axis rotation while locked [deg]

rotRangeLerpBeginHeight.AltName: Locked X-axis rotation interpolation start height [m]

rotRangeLerpEndHeight.AltName: Locked X-axis rotation interpolation end height [m]

rotHiSpeedX_Min.AltName: X-axis high speed rotation speed [deg/sec] minimum value

rotHiSpeedX_Max.AltName: X-axis high speed rotation speed [deg/sec] maximum value

rotHiSpeedY_Min.AltName: Y-axis high speed rotation speed [deg/sec] minimum value

rotHiSpeedY_Max.AltName: Y-axis high speed rotation speed [deg/sec] maximum value

lockRotXShiftRatio.AltName: Lock x rotation shift rate (0.0 to 1.0)

updateTargetRotXByLock.AltName: Update target X-axis rotation with lock?

updateTargetRotXByFrontLock.AltName: Update target X-axis rotation with forward lock?

lockCamAdjustRotX_Max.AltName: Lock camera adjustment X-axis rotation [deg] maximum value

lockCamAdjustRotY_Max.AltName: Lock camera adjustment Y-axis rotation [deg] maximum value

lockCamAdjustRotChaseRate.AltName: Lock camera adjustment rotation tracking rate

escapeWallRotAddY.AltName: Wall avoidance Y-axis rotation addition value [deg/sec]

escapeWallRotMaxY.AltName: Wall avoidance Y-axis rotation maximum value [deg/sec]

transChaseRateLock.AltName: Locked character translational tracking rate (0.0 to 1.0)

targetChaseDistRateLock.AltName: Target distance tracking rate while locked (0.0 to 1.0)

lockRotChaseRateMaxTime.AltName: Lock rotation tracking rate application time [sec]

useRotationBrake.AltName: Should a brake be used for rotational operation?

useRotationBrakeReverseAdjust.AltName: Whether to enable brake reverse correction for rotation

rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedX.AltName: X rotation brake time addition amount at high speed [sec]

rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedY.AltName: Y rotation brake time addition amount at high speed [sec]
